name: §6Elephant
description:
§8Farming Pet

§7Health: §c100
§7Intelligence: §b75

§6Stomp
§7Gain §a20❈ Defense §7for every 100 §f✦
§fSpeed§7.

§6Walking Fortress
§7Gain §c1❤ Health §7for every 10 §a❈
§aDefense§7.

§6Trunk Efficiency
§7Grants §6+150 ☘ Farming Fortune§7, which
§7increases your chance for multiple
§7drops.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

variants.name: Black Plushie Elephant Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aElephant§7 pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
